Project notes:
- Built with Next.js App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, GSAP ScrollTrigger, Lenis, React Three Fiber, and next-themes.
- Added scalable architecture directories: components, sections, animations, shaders, hooks, lib, styles.
- Implemented design tokens, reusable wrappers, smooth scrolling, scroll reveals, gradient and grain systems, and motion-safe optimizations.
- Verified production build succeeds with npm run build.
